system.description: The head of this ornately carved mace opens on hinges so incense can be put inside to wisp as the mace swings. The haft has a recipe carved into it, instructions to make special incense out of bone and rare sap and unguents. If that incense burns in the mace, it can destroy ghosts or demons with a single hit.
system.additional_info: This was a founding artifact of the Church of the Ecstasy of the Flesh. If it were returned, they would gain a fresh following from critics who feel the church cannot protect against supernatural threats.
